initial_config:
# Reversa — Project Configuration
# This file is managed by the installer. For customizations, edit config.user.toml

[project]
name = "reversa-scenario-b-phase8-66VA46"
version = "1.0.0"

[user]
name = "Neo"
chat_language = "en-us"
doc_language = "English"

[output]
folder = "_reversa_sdd"

[agents]
installed = [
  "reversa",
  "reversa-scout",
  "reversa-archaeologist",
  "reversa-content-server"
]

[engines]
installed = [
  "codex"
]

[analysis]
answer_mode = "chat"
doc_level = "completo"

[integrations.cs_agent]
enabled = false
profile = ""
executable = ""
context_dir = ".reversa/context/cs-agent"
inventory_path = ""
snapshot_ttl_days = 7

[specs]
layout = ""              # constant "feature-folder" after the first run
granularity = ""         # module | use-case | endpoint | hybrid | feature | custom
custom_folders = []      # populated only when granularity == "custom"
scout_suggestion = ""    # record of Scout's original suggestion, immutable after the 1st run
decided_at = ""          # ISO 8601 timestamp of the user's choice

data.hint: Resolved cs-agent from environment. Pin integrations.cs_agent.executable for repeatable project runs.
Resolved cs-agent from environment. Pin integrations.cs_agent.executable for repeatable project runs.

organization_suggestion.rationale: Disposable fixture; Scout recorded detection before migration prompt.

config_after_accept:
# Reversa — Project Configuration
# This file is managed by the installer. For customizations, edit config.user.toml

[project]
name = "reversa-scenario-b-phase8-66VA46"
version = "1.0.0"

[user]
name = "Neo"
chat_language = "en-us"
doc_language = "English"

[output]
folder = "_reversa_sdd"

[agents]
installed = [
  "reversa",
  "reversa-scout",
  "reversa-archaeologist",
  "reversa-content-server"
]

[engines]
installed = [
  "codex"
]

[analysis]
answer_mode = "chat"
doc_level = "completo"

[integrations.cs_agent]
enabled = true
profile = "CS253"
executable = ""
context_dir = ".reversa/context/cs-agent"
inventory_path = "_reversa_sdd/inventory.md"
snapshot_ttl_days = 7

[specs]
layout = ""              # constant "feature-folder" after the first run
granularity = ""         # module | use-case | endpoint | hybrid | feature | custom
custom_folders = []      # populated only when granularity == "custom"
scout_suggestion = ""    # record of Scout's original suggestion, immutable after the 1st run
decided_at = ""          # ISO 8601 timestamp of the user's choice
config_user_after_accept:
# Reversa — Personal Settings
# This file is for your personal customizations. Do NOT commit this file.
# Add .reversa/config.user.toml to your personal .gitignore.

# Override example:
# [user]
# name = "Your Name"
# chat_language = "pt-br"

# Optional Content Server integration override:
# [integrations.cs_agent]
# executable = "F:\\smoke\\CS253\\cs-agent.exe"
# profile = "CS253"

[integrations.cs_agent]
executable = "F:\\smoke\\CS253\\cs-agent.exe"
